hero.description: Avantiqo 将员工、客户、运营、财务、CRM、营销、设计、集成和合成智能连接到一个统一的企业操作系统中。它不仅存储信息，还连接整个组织，使管理层能够了解正在发生什么、为什么会发生以及下一步应该做什么。

cta.description: Avantiqo 将运营、财务、员工、营销和客户体验通过合成智能操作系统连接在一起。

realityContent: 大多数酒店业务通过分离系统运作。预订在一个平台，运营在另一个平台，财务滞后几周才看到业务情况，营销依赖假设，管理层被动应对。
问题不在于数据缺失，而在于缺乏理解。
酒店业务不需要更多软件，它们需要一个统一的操作系统。
hospitality.runtimeContent: 不是独立部门，也不是独立软件。每个动作都是同一业务故事的一部分。
relationshipsItems: 预订不仅仅是预订，这是需求。
班次不仅仅是班次，这是劳动力成本。
订单不仅仅是订单，这是收入。
评论不仅仅是评论，这是未来增长。
hospitality.relationshipsDescription: 这就是软件与合成智能的区别。Avantiqo 将操作活动直接与业务意义连接。
hospitality.intelligenceDescription: 酒店业务不是孤立事件的集合。每个动作都会在整个业务中产生连锁影响。Avantiqo 会自动跟踪这些影响。

hero.title2: Before It Tells You Something Is Wrong.
hero.description: Patients, clinicians, operations, finance, compliance and leadership connected through one synthetic intelligence layer.

runtime.title1: Patient Demand. Clinical Workload. Bed Capacity.
runtime.title2: Staff Availability. Financial Exposure. Compliance Risk.

cta.title2: The future will be built around intelligence.
cta.description: Avantiqo connects patients, clinicians, operations, finance, compliance and leadership through one Synthetic Intelligence Operating System.

healthcare.operational_bottlenecks_create_delays_lo: Operational bottlenecks create delays long before management becomes aware of them.
healthcare.overstaffing_and_understaffing_often_hap: Overstaffing and understaffing often happen at the same time across different departments.
healthcare.disconnected_systems_create_missed_billi: Disconnected systems create missed billing opportunities and hidden operational costs.
healthcare.beds_rooms_equipment_and_staff_capacity_: Beds, rooms, equipment and staff capacity are rarely viewed as one connected reality.
healthcare.risk_grows_when_operational_events_and_c: Risk grows when operational events and compliance obligations are disconnected.
healthcare.leadership_receives_reports_after_events: Leadership receives reports after events occur instead of understanding risks before they happen.
healthcare.live_operational_visibility_across_patie: Live operational visibility across patients, clinicians, capacity, finance and compliance.
healthcare.predictive_intelligence_identifies_press: Predictive intelligence identifies pressure, risk and bottlenecks before escalation.
healthcare.recommended_actions_help_leadership_inte: Recommended actions help leadership intervene before operational failure occurs.
healthcare.reality_content_1: A patient admission affects staffing. Staffing affects scheduling. Scheduling affects capacity. Capacity affects treatment times.
healthcare.reality_content_2: Treatment affects outcomes. Outcomes affect reimbursement. Reimbursement affects financial performance.
healthcare.reality_content_3: Most healthcare organizations track these as separate events. Avantiqo understands them as one connected operational chain.
healthcare.reality_content_4: The problem is not data. The problem is that nobody sees how the data moves through the business.
healthcare.runtime_content_1: Patient demand. Clinical workload. Bed utilization. Operating theatre capacity.
healthcare.runtime_content_2: Laboratory throughput. Staff availability. Financial performance. Compliance exposure.
healthcare.runtime_content_3: Connected through one operational runtime so leadership can act before pressure becomes failure.
healthcare.ownership_content_1: Most executives receive reports after events occur. Avantiqo identifies operational pressure before it becomes a problem.
healthcare.ownership_content_2: See staffing shortages before schedules fail. See capacity constraints before patient delays increase.
healthcare.ownership_content_3: See financial exposure before budgets are impacted. See compliance risk before audits reveal it.

construction.construction_hero_title1: Control every site before delays become losses.
construction.construction_hero_description: Replace delayed site reporting and disconnected workflows with one connected construction operating system.
construction.before_after_title: Replace disconnected construction management with live project control.
construction.features_title: Site, office and finance connected live.
construction.feature_1_text: Track progress, budgets, approvals, delays, manpower and site performance in real time.
construction.feature_2_text: Supervisors upload photos, daily reports, issues and progress updates directly from site.
construction.feature_3_text: Control purchase requests, supplier orders, material delivery and inventory visibility.
construction.feature_4_text: Monitor attendance, subcontractors, labor cost, payroll approvals and workforce activity.
construction.feature_5_text: Manage multiple construction sites, budgets and project teams from one operational runtime.
construction.feature_6_text: Project owners and executives see live progress, costs, approvals and risks from anywhere.
construction.why_1_text: See every project, milestone, budget, delay, approval and risk from one operational runtime.
construction.why_2_text: Track subcontractors, attendance, progress, photos and task completion with evidence.
construction.why_3_text: Connect procurement, labor, inventory and project spend to understand real profitability.
construction.why_4_text: Owners and executives can monitor every site without waiting for weekly reports.
construction.portal_client_text: Clients can follow progress, approvals, milestones, photos, invoices and project status in real time.
construction.portal_contractor_text: Subcontractors can submit updates, attendance, photos, documents and completion evidence directly from site.
construction.si_1_text: Identify schedule risks before they impact project delivery.
construction.si_2_text: Detect procurement, labor and change-order risks before they become financial problems.
construction.si_3_text: Generate owner-ready project summaries automatically from site activity.
construction.si_4_text: Recommend purchasing actions based on inventory, project schedules and supplier performance.
construction.marketing_text: Generate company profiles, capability statements, tender documents, project case studies, social media posts and marketing campaigns directly from completed projects.
construction.challenge_title: Construction Companies Are Losing Money Every Day
construction.challenge_text: Most construction companies do not lose money because they lack projects. They lose money because they lack visibility. Delays, procurement mistakes, subcontractor issues, budget overruns and communication failures often remain hidden until they have already damaged profitability. Avantiqo gives management real-time visibility across projects, people, suppliers, budgets and execution so problems can be solved before they become losses.
construction.profitability_title: Know Which Projects Actually Make Money
construction.profitability_text: Revenue is not profit. Most construction companies can tell you project revenue, but very few can accurately explain project profitability. Avantiqo connects quotations, budgets, procurement, inventory, labor, subcontractors, equipment costs and invoices into one financial model so management can see exactly where profit is generated and where margins are disappearing.
construction.flow_text: Construction companies often operate with disconnected systems. Sales uses one platform, project teams use another, procurement uses spreadsheets and accounting operates separately. Avantiqo connects the entire lifecycle from lead generation and quotations to project completion, billing, case studies and marketing, creating a single operational runtime for the entire company.
construction.workforce_text: Managing hundreds of workers, supervisors and subcontractors across multiple sites is one of the biggest challenges in construction. Avantiqo provides workforce visibility, attendance tracking, payroll management, productivity monitoring, contractor oversight and operational reporting from one connected platform.
construction.procurement_text: Materials, equipment and procurement represent some of the largest project costs. Avantiqo connects purchase requests, supplier management, inventory, warehouses, equipment tracking and project allocations into one procurement engine. Every material movement becomes visible and every purchase becomes traceable.
construction.difference_text: Most software solves one problem. Project management software manages tasks. ERP systems manage accounting. CRM systems manage customers. Avantiqo connects the entire construction business. Projects, procurement, workforce, finance, clients, marketing and synthetic intelligence operate from one environment instead of ten disconnected systems.
construction.future_text: The future construction company operates with live visibility, connected workflows and predictive intelligence. Instead of reacting to delays, budget overruns and operational surprises, management can make informed decisions before problems occur. Avantiqo transforms construction companies from reactive organizations into proactive businesses.
construction.cta_text: Connect projects, procurement, workforce, finance, reporting, client visibility, marketing and synthetic intelligence into one construction operating system.
construction.difference_1_text: Project management tools manage tasks. Construction companies need to manage entire businesses.
construction.difference_2_text: Traditional ERP systems were built around accounting. Avantiqo is built around operational reality.
construction.difference_3_text: Every project, supplier, worker, asset and transaction becomes part of one connected operational model.
construction.difference_4_text: Replace disconnected project software, CRM, ERP, reporting and marketing tools with one connected environment.

showcaseSections.title: 为每位员工提供专属工作空间，领导层的单一信息来源。
showcaseSections.intro: 大多数组织认为拥有员工管理系统。实际上，他们使用的是一套分散工具，迫使员工和管理者频繁切换平台。
paragraphs: 考勤在单一系统中记录。排班在其他系统中管理。工资通过电子表格计算。培训记录存储在文件夹中。绩效评估依赖人工监督、记忆和分散报告。
随着组织发展，这种分散带来复杂性。管理者花更多时间收集信息而非管理团队。员工因期望不明确而感到挫败。领导层无法全面了解团队绩效。
Avantiqo员工门户为每位员工创建专属操作工作区。员工无需切换多个系统即可在单一环境中管理考勤、排班、职责、工资、培训、沟通和绩效。
管理者实时查看谁在岗、谁迟到、谁高效、谁需要支持以及谁超额完成任务。这将人力管理从被动流程转变为主动管理。
结果是责任明确、透明且可控。每个操作可衡量，每项职责可见，每位员工都成为操作智能层的一部分。
points: 考勤、打卡、迟到和缺勤跟踪
排班、班次、任务分配和日常执行
工资可视化、奖金、扣款和审批
绩效评估、培训和合规管理

提升信任，减少行政工作，创造更专业的客户体验。
客户保持知情。企业显得有条理。关系更加稳固。

whatIsAvantiqo.title2: 但只有极少数拥有智能。
paragraphs: 大多数组织依靠彼此孤立的系统、电子表格、电子邮件、聊天工具以及部门专用软件来运营。每个团队只能看到企业的一小部分，而管理层却必须在缺乏全局视角的情况下做出决策。
销售部门与财务部门分离。运营部门与客户服务分离。市场营销与执行团队分离。员工使用一套工具，而管理层依赖另一套工具。
结果是延误、重复工作、错失机会以及基于不完整信息做出的决策。问题并不在于缺乏数据，而在于没有人能够看到数据之间的关联。
Avantiqo 成为连接整个组织的运营智能层，将企业的每一个部分整合到同一个环境中。

whyAvantiqo.eyebrow: 为什么 AVANTIQO 与众不同
whyAvantiqo.title3: 而 Avantiqo 创造一个智能层。
whyAvantiqo.intro: 现代企业并不缺少软件，它们缺少的是软件之间的连接。
paragraphs: 现代组织已经被不断增长的软件集合所困住。
客户管理使用 CRM。财务使用会计系统。运营使用项目管理平台。薪资使用独立工具。营销使用独立工具。沟通使用独立工具。报表使用独立工具。
每出现一个新问题，就会增加一个新系统。每增加一个新系统，就会产生一个新的信息来源。每增加一个新的信息来源，就会增加一层复杂性。
随着时间推移，组织被软件包围，却越来越难理解企业内部真正发生了什么。
各部门开始独立运作。信息被割裂。报表变得不一致。管理层花费更多时间收集信息，而不是做出决策。
问题不在于组织缺乏技术。问题在于技术彼此孤立。
大多数软件只解决单一问题。极少有软件能够理解问题之间的联系。
客户问题最终会变成运营问题。运营问题最终会变成财务问题。人员问题最终会变成客户问题。市场营销决策最终会变成盈利能力决策。
企业中的一切都是相互关联的，而传统软件很少反映这种现实。
Avantiqo 建立在完全不同的理念之上。它不是再创建一个孤立的应用程序，而是为整个组织建立统一的智能层。
员工。客户。运营。财务。市场营销。项目。合规。报告。管理层。
全部连接在同一个环境中。
这意味着管理层不再看到来自不同部门的孤立报告，而是能够看到彼此之间的关系。
员工绩效如何影响利润。运营执行如何影响客户满意度。营销表现如何影响收入。项目交付如何影响现金流。合规如何影响组织风险。
组织不再只是管理软件系统，而是真正管理整个企业。
whyAvantiqo.conclusion1: 一个组织。一个智能层。一个运营现实。一个真实可信的数据来源。
whyAvantiqo.conclusion2: 大多数软件帮助组织存储信息，而 Avantiqo 帮助组织理解信息。

accountingAdvisory.title2: 现代顾问服务需要理解当下。
accountingAdvisory.intro: 大多数会计师事务所在重要决策已经做出之后才获得信息。Avantiqo 让会计师能够在企业运营过程中获得实时洞察，而不是数周之后。
paragraphs: 大多数会计师事务所在重要决策已经做出之后才获得信息。
发票在工作完成后才到达。工资在人工成本已经发生后才处理。财务报告在运营决策已经影响盈利能力之后才生成。
当会计师发现问题时，问题往往已经存在数周甚至数月。他们能够解释发生了什么，却往往无法看清为什么会发生。
盈利能力下降可能由人员效率低下造成。现金流压力可能由运营延误造成。利润率下降可能由项目超支造成。客户流失可能由服务问题造成。
Avantiqo 通过将运营活动直接连接到财务智能来改变这一现状。企业无需等到月底，会计师事务所便能够在企业运营过程中理解其表现。
他们可以看到员工绩效、运营瓶颈、项目执行情况、客户活动以及市场营销效果。
这改变了会计师的角色。事务所不再只是合规服务提供者，而是成为企业的战略顾问。
与客户的交流变得更有价值。建议更加准确。问题能够在造成财务损失之前被发现。
这建立了更牢固的客户关系，因为会计师不再只是报告结果，而是在帮助影响结果。
对于会计师事务所而言，这带来了显著的竞争优势。客户留存时间更长，顾问收入增加，客户关系更加深入。
传统会计解释过去。Avantiqo 帮助会计师事务所在事情发生时理解企业。
